title: 7 Lies a Godly Man's Work Ethic Has to Kill
caption:
Busy isn't the same thing as faithful.

He rested on the seventh day before you'd done a thing to earn it, and the unscalable work nobody sees is usually the real assignment. A godly man's work ethic isn't about the title on the door or a good week making up for a slow one with God.

Seven lies to kill before they quietly run your 20s.

#faith #workethic #discipline #christianman #godlyman
